name: French Apple Cake with Apricot Glaze
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Skim milk mixed with 1 tsp
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 9-inch x 12-inch baking dish with a nonstick spray.
3. Cream margarine with sugar in a bowl until smooth.
4. Beat in egg, then sift together dry ingredients (flour and baking powder).
5. Alternate adding milk and vanilla to the egg mixture, stirring gently after each addition.
6. Fold the wet ingredients into the flour mixture using a food processor or mixer, processing only until combined.
7. Spread batter evenly in prepared dish.
8. Top with sliced apples.
9. Mix topping ingredients together in a bowl or measuring jug.
10. Dot over top of cake with margarine.
11. Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until a skewer inserted into the center comes out clean.
12. Cool completely on a wire rack.
13. For glaze, heat apricot jam, lemon juice, and water in a saucepan or measuring jug until boiling. Reduce heat and simmer for a few minutes. If needed, add a little more water to achieve desired consistency.
14. Drizzle glaze over the cooled cake before serving.
Nutritional value per serving: 253 calories, 3.8g protein (6%), 54g carbohydrate (83%), 3g total fat (11%), .7g saturated fat, 23mg cholesterol, 146mg sodium.
